prompt_inputs.goal: Match day nutrition for optimal performance and recovery in professional soccer

solution_criteria: Includes 4-5 meals/snacks timed around match schedule with hydration strategy
Balances quick carbohydrates for energy, protein for recovery, and electrolytes for hydration
Meal plan is compact and fits within a single day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (professional soccer player) balancing hydration, quick energy sources, and recovery nutrition for a match day schedule

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize muscle recovery and strength gains from weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day in compact format
Protein is distributed across at least 4 meals with 25-40g per meal
Includes nutrient timing strategy around workout (pre/post-workout meals specified)
Total daily calories and macronutrients align with strength athlete needs
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) focusing on protein distribution across meals and strategic nutrient timing for muscle recovery

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and pre/post-workout nutrition optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre- and post-workout snacks aligned with marathon training
Total daily calories meet high-endurance athlete requirements (approximately 3,500-4,000 kcal)
Carbohydrates comprise 60-65% of total daily intake with strategic timing around training
Plan is presented in compact, single-day format with clear meal timing
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum caloric intake and carbohydrate loading with specific timing around training sessions
